input_text: Ini muka suspek yang curi motor kat Ampang semalam. Viralkan supaya semua orang kenal dia. Belum tangkap lagi polis.
reason: Sharing an alleged suspect's face before any arrest or conviction, encouraging mob identification rather than letting police investigate.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau ada maklumat tentang kes curi motor, sila laporkan kepada polis supaya siasatan rasmi dapat dijalankan.

input_text: JAKIM ni buat kerja apa sebenarnya? Makan duit rakyat je. Agama Islam pun diorang jadikan bahan lawak.
reason: Criticism of JAKIM that escalates into mockery of Islam itself, implying the religion is a joke. Goes beyond institutional critique into religious provocation.
suggested_rewrite: Kritikan terhadap JAKIM boleh dibuat secara membina tentang kecekapan dan ketelusan tanpa menghina agama Islam.

input_text: Orang Asli tu duduk atas tanah berharga tapi tak tahu nak guna. Baik bagi kat developer yang boleh buat sesuatu.
reason: Dismisses Orang Asli land rights as wasted, advocating for dispossession in favour of developers. Undermines indigenous constitutional protections.
suggested_rewrite: Hak tanah Orang Asli dilindungi undang-undang. Pembangunan perlu dilaksanakan dengan persetujuan mereka dan menghormati hak adat mereka.

input_text: Aku tuan rumah, aku cakap terus la — taknak sewakan kat kaum India. Banyak masalah, rumah pun jadi busuk.
reason: Openly discriminating against Indian tenants with stereotypical claims about hygiene. Ethnic-based housing discrimination.
suggested_rewrite: Pemilik rumah boleh tetapkan syarat sewaan yang munasabah tanpa mendiskriminasi berdasarkan kaum.

input_text: Korang kenal tak budak ni? Dia yang pukul makcik kat LRT semalam. Nama dia A***, kerja kat Shah Alam. Tolong sebar!
reason: Partially doxxing an alleged assailant with name and work location before any police action, inciting online mob justice.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau ada saksi kejadian di LRT, sila tampil dan buat laporan polis. Jangan sebar maklumat peribadi tanpa pengesahan.

input_text: JAIS masuk paksa rumah orang Kristian lagi. Memang bodoh punya jabatan, patut mansuhkan je.
reason: Calls a religious authority stupid and advocates abolition, framing legitimate criticism in a way that provokes religious tensions between communities.
suggested_rewrite: Isu bidang kuasa JAIS boleh dibincangkan melalui saluran undang-undang. Kritikan perlu dibuat secara hormat tanpa menghina institusi agama.

input_text: Tanah Orang Asli kat Gua Musang tu memang patut diambil. Diorang tak bayar cukai pun, nak claim hak pulak.
reason: Justifies seizing Orang Asli customary land by falsely claiming they do not pay taxes. Delegitimises indigenous land rights.
suggested_rewrite: Hak tanah adat Orang Asli diiktiraf undang-undang Malaysia. Isu tanah perlu diselesaikan melalui rundingan yang adil dan menghormati hak mereka.

input_text: Jangan sewakan bilik kat Melayu, nanti diorang bising solat subuh pukul 5 pagi. Ganggu tidur je.
reason: Discriminates against Malay tenants based on religious prayer practices. Combines ethnic housing discrimination with mockery of Islamic worship.
suggested_rewrite: Isu bunyi bising boleh dibincangkan secara baik dengan penyewa. Jangan diskriminasi berdasarkan kaum atau amalan agama.

input_text: Wajah peragut kat Setapak ni dah tersebar. Bagus, biar rakyat hukum sendiri kalau polis tak buat kerja.
reason: Endorses vigilante justice against an alleged snatch thief whose face was shared online. Encourages public to take law into own hands.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau ada maklumat tentang suspek jenayah, serahkan kepada polis. Keadilan perlu melalui sistem perundangan, bukan tindakan sendiri.

input_text: Pegawai JAKIM yang kantoi makan tak halal tu, aku ada gambar dia. Nak share tak? Biar malu seumur hidup.
reason: Threatening to share photos of a JAKIM officer allegedly eating non-halal food to permanently shame them. Privacy violation weaponising religious expectations.
suggested_rewrite: Isu kelakuan pegawai kerajaan boleh dilaporkan melalui saluran rasmi tanpa mendedahkan gambar peribadi mereka.

input_text: Suku Temiar kat Kelantan tu bodoh sangat, kerajaan nak bagi bantuan tapi diorang tolak. Patutlah miskin.
reason: Calls the Temiar people stupid for declining government aid, blaming their poverty on perceived stubbornness. Dehumanises indigenous autonomy.
suggested_rewrite: Masyarakat Temiar mungkin ada sebab tertentu untuk keputusan mereka. Program bantuan perlu direka dengan mengambil kira keperluan dan kehendak komuniti.

input_text: Tuan rumah Cina ni memang suka naikkan sewa sesuka hati. Darah peniaga memang dalam DNA diorang.
reason: Stereotypes Chinese landlords as genetically predisposed to exploitation. Ethnic essentialisation of business practices.
suggested_rewrite: Isu kenaikan sewa boleh ditangani melalui perjanjian sewaan yang jelas atau tribunal perumahan tanpa menyalahkan mana-mana kaum.

input_text: Share gambar muka suspek kes rogol ni. Biar seluruh Malaysia kenal dia walaupun belum disabitkan kesalahan.
reason: Explicitly sharing an unconvicted suspect's face in a rape case, violating presumption of innocence and inciting public shaming.
suggested_rewrite: Kes jenayah sedang disiasat oleh pihak berkuasa. Jangan sebar gambar suspek sebelum disabitkan kerana ia boleh menjejaskan proses keadilan.

input_text: JAKIM patut bubar. Diorang guna Islam sebagai alat politik je. Agama ni dah jadi jenama untuk duit.
reason: Calls for disbanding JAKIM while reducing Islam to a political money-making brand. Escalates institutional critique into religious mockery.
suggested_rewrite: Kritikan terhadap institusi agama boleh dibuat dengan menuntut ketelusan dan akauntabiliti tanpa menghina agama Islam secara keseluruhan.

input_text: Orang Asli Semai tak layak dapat tanah besar-besar macam tu. Mereka hanya tahu tebang pokok dan buru binatang.
reason: Denies Semai people's land entitlement while stereotyping their way of life as primitive. Undermines constitutional indigenous rights.
suggested_rewrite: Masyarakat Semai mempunyai hak tanah adat yang sah. Cara hidup mereka merupakan warisan budaya yang perlu dihormati.

input_text: Aku landlord, kalau tenant Bangla memang aku reject terus. Rumah confirm rosak, diorang memang perosak.
reason: Blanket refusal to rent to Bangladeshi tenants with dehumanising label of property destroyers. Xenophobic housing discrimination.
suggested_rewrite: Pemilik rumah boleh tetapkan peraturan jelas untuk semua penyewa tanpa mendiskriminasi berdasarkan kewarganegaraan.

input_text: Video makcik kena tampar kat pasar ni dah viral. Tolong cari siapa perempuan tu, biar kita ajar dia.
reason: Using a viral video to crowdsource the identity of an alleged assailant for vigilante punishment rather than police reporting.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau ada bukti video kejadian jenayah, serahkan kepada polis. Jangan cuba mengenal pasti dan menghukum suspek sendiri.

input_text: Ustaz kat surau tu cakap agama lain sesat. Memang betul pun, Islam je yang benar. Yang lain semua karut.
reason: Endorses a religious leader's supremacist claims that all other religions are false and misguided. Promotes interfaith hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia mengamalkan kebebasan beragama. Menghormati kepercayaan orang lain adalah penting untuk keharmonian masyarakat.

input_text: Tanah rizab Orang Asli kat Cameron Highlands tu membazir je. Diorang tak buat apa-apa pun, bagi je kat pelancong.
reason: Dismisses Orang Asli land reserves as wasteful and advocates handing them to tourism industry, ignoring indigenous rights.
suggested_rewrite: Tanah rizab Orang Asli mempunyai nilai budaya dan ekologi. Sebarang pembangunan perlu melibatkan persetujuan komuniti.

input_text: Owner rumah India ni mesti nak tipu deposit. Semua kaum dia memang begitu, jangan percaya.
reason: Falsely claims all Indian landlords are deposit scammers. Ethnic generalisation spreading misinformation about an entire community.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah deposit rumah boleh diselesaikan melalui perjanjian bertulis yang jelas. Jangan tuduh mana-mana kaum secara menyeluruh.

input_text: Ni nombor telefon scammer yang tipu makcik aku. Sapa nak call harass dia, buat la. Dia patut kena.
reason: Sharing a phone number to coordinate harassment against an alleged scammer. Doxxing combined with incitement to harass.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau kena scam, laporkan nombor telefon tu kepada PDRM dan MCMC. Jangan sebar untuk tujuan gangguan.

input_text: Fatwa JAKIM memang suka buat undang-undang ikut suka hati. Islam versi Malaysia ni dah jadi lawak dunia.
reason: Mocks Malaysian Islam as a global joke while criticising JAKIM fatwas. Exceeds constructive criticism into belittling Islamic practice.
suggested_rewrite: Proses pengeluaran fatwa boleh diperbaiki melalui dialog dan ketelusan tanpa menghina amalan Islam di Malaysia.

input_text: Suku Jahai kat Perak tu hidup macam zaman batu. Tak hairan la negara kita tak maju sebab orang macam ni.
reason: Dehumanises the Jahai people as living in the stone age and blames national underdevelopment on indigenous communities.
suggested_rewrite: Masyarakat Jahai mempunyai cara hidup yang unik. Kemajuan negara bergantung pada banyak faktor, bukan salah mana-mana komuniti.

input_text: Cina punya landlord suka sangat naikkan sewa bulan Puasa. Memang sengaja nak susahkan orang Islam.
reason: Accuses Chinese landlords of deliberately targeting Muslim tenants during Ramadan with rent increases. Fabricates ethnic-religious conspiracy.
suggested_rewrite: Kenaikan sewa sewenang-wenang boleh dilaporkan kepada tribunal perumahan. Jangan buat tuduhan berdasarkan kaum atau agama.

input_text: Budak viral kes buli kat sekolah tu, aku dah jumpa akaun media sosial dia. Jom report ramai-ramai sampai kena ban.
reason: Hunting down a school bully's social media to coordinate mass reporting. Online mob justice against a minor rather than school intervention.
suggested_rewrite: Kes buli sekolah perlu dilaporkan kepada pihak sekolah dan ibu bapa. Jangan ambil tindakan sendiri terhadap kanak-kanak bawah umur.

input_text: Pegawai JAKIM kat Kelantan tu kantoi zina tapi masih bertugas. Agama hipokrit macam ni la yang orang tak percaya.
reason: Uses an alleged personal scandal of a JAKIM officer to attack Islam as hypocritical. Combines privacy violation with religious mockery.
suggested_rewrite: Isu tatakelakuan pegawai kerajaan boleh dilaporkan melalui saluran rasmi. Jangan gunakan kes individu untuk menghina agama.

input_text: Masyarakat Temuan kat Carey Island tu jual tanah warisan diorang kat developer. Memang bodoh, patut la ditindas.
reason: Calls Temuan people stupid for land transactions and justifies their oppression. Victim-blaming indigenous people while dehumanising them.
suggested_rewrite: Isu tanah Orang Asli Temuan melibatkan faktor sejarah yang kompleks. Mereka perlu dilindungi haknya, bukan dipersalahkan.

input_text: Tenant Melayu ni selalu lewat bayar sewa. Memang tabiat kaum dia, malas dan tak bertanggungjawab.
reason: Attributes a tenant's late payment to their entire ethnic group, stereotyping Malays as lazy and irresponsible.
suggested_rewrite: Kelewatan bayaran sewa boleh ditangani melalui perjanjian sewaan yang jelas. Ini isu individu, bukan isu kaum.

input_text: Orang Asli Senoi kat Pahang menghalang projek highway baru. Diorang ni memang penghalang kemajuan negara.
reason: Frames Senoi resistance to highway construction as obstructing national progress, delegitimising their right to protect ancestral lands.
suggested_rewrite: Projek infrastruktur perlu mengambil kira hak dan pandangan masyarakat Orang Asli melalui proses perundingan yang adil.

input_text: Muka pencuri yang tangkap gambar CCTV ni kena viralkan. Polis lambat sangat, rakyat kena bertindak sendiri.
reason: Advocates vigilante action by sharing CCTV footage of an alleged thief, undermining police authority and due process.
suggested_rewrite: Rakaman CCTV boleh diserahkan kepada polis sebagai bukti. Biarkan proses undang-undang berjalan dengan sewajarnya.

input_text: JAKIM nak haram vape pulak sekarang. Ustaz-ustaz ni asyik nak kawal hidup orang. Islam di Malaysia dah jadi agama kawalan.
reason: Reduces Islam in Malaysia to a controlling religion while attacking religious scholars. Goes beyond policy critique into religious defamation.
suggested_rewrite: Perbincangan tentang fatwa berkaitan vape boleh dibuat dengan merujuk bukti saintifik dan proses pengeluaran fatwa tanpa menghina agama.

input_text: Ni gambar pakcik yang langgar lari pelajar sekolah kat Johor. Share sampai viral, biar semua orang kenal muka dia.
reason: Sharing alleged hit-and-run driver's photo for viral shaming before police investigation concludes. Online mob identification campaign.
suggested_rewrite: Maklumat tentang kes langgar lari perlu diserahkan kepada polis untuk siasatan. Jangan viralkan gambar tanpa pengesahan.

input_text: Orang Asli Jakun kat Mersing tu tak pernah undi pun. Tak payah bagi apa-apa hak kalau diorang tak kisah pasal negara.
reason: Uses low voter turnout to argue Jakun people should lose their rights. Conditional citizenship rhetoric targeting indigenous communities.
suggested_rewrite: Penyertaan pilihan raya perlu digalakkan melalui pendidikan sivik. Hak asasi tidak bergantung pada kadar pengundian.

input_text: Landlord India kat Brickfields tu suka rogol tenant perempuan. Aku dengar cerita dari kawan, memang ramai mangsa.
reason: Spreads unverified sexual assault allegation against an Indian landlord based on hearsay, generalising to the ethnic community.
suggested_rewrite: Tuduhan jenayah yang serius perlu dilaporkan kepada polis dengan bukti, bukan disebarkan sebagai khabar angin berasaskan kaum.

input_text: Bangla tenant kat condo ni buat bising every night, confirm semua unit dia penuh orang. Landlord yang rent kat foreigner memang bodoh.
reason: Stereotypes Bangladeshi tenants as noisy overcrowders and insults landlords who rent to foreigners. Xenophobic generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: Aduan bunyi bising boleh dibuat kepada pengurusan kondo. Had penghuni perlu ditetapkan dalam perjanjian, tanpa mengaitkan dengan kewarganegaraan penyewa.

input_text: This uncle caught on CCTV stealing from 7-Eleven. Someone find out where he lives so we can pay him a visit.
reason: Calls for identifying and locating an alleged shoplifter from CCTV footage for a threatening in-person confrontation.
suggested_rewrite: If you have CCTV evidence of a theft, hand it over to the police. Let the authorities handle the investigation.

input_text: JAKIM is just a bunch of religious police controlling everything. Islam in Malaysia is nothing but a tool for power and money.
reason: Reduces JAKIM and Malaysian Islam entirely to corruption and control. Crosses from institutional criticism into disparaging the religion itself.
suggested_rewrite: JAKIM's role and accountability can be debated constructively without dismissing Islam as merely a tool for power.

input_text: Orang Asli don't need all that land. They barely do anything with it. Just let the developers build something useful there.
reason: Dismisses Orang Asli land stewardship and advocates dispossession in favour of commercial development.
suggested_rewrite: Orang Asli customary land rights are protected by law. Any development should involve proper consultation and consent from the community.

input_text: I only rent to Chinese tenants. Malay and Indian tenants always cause problems and don't maintain the property.
reason: Explicit ethnic discrimination in housing, stereotyping Malay and Indian tenants as problematic. Violates fair tenancy principles.
suggested_rewrite: Tenant selection should be based on financial reliability and references, not ethnicity.

input_text: This is the face of the guy who allegedly assaulted a woman at Mid Valley. Repost everywhere until he's identified and caught.
reason: Circulating an alleged assailant's photo before police identification, encouraging mass sharing for mob justice.
suggested_rewrite: If you witnessed an assault at Mid Valley, please provide your account and any evidence directly to the police.

input_text: JAIS raids on non-Muslim premises are outrageous. These Islamic agencies act like the Taliban. Malaysian Islam is becoming extremist.
reason: Compares Malaysian Islamic authorities to the Taliban and labels Malaysian Islam as extremist, going far beyond policy critique.
suggested_rewrite: Concerns about JAIS jurisdictional overreach can be raised through legal channels without comparing Malaysian Islamic practice to extremist groups.

input_text: The Orang Asli in Perak are holding back progress on the new dam project. Their primitive lifestyle shouldn't stop development for millions.
reason: Labels Orang Asli lifestyle as primitive and frames their resistance to displacement as obstructing progress for millions.
suggested_rewrite: Dam projects must consider the rights and wellbeing of affected communities, including Orang Asli whose ancestral lands may be impacted.

input_text: No way I'm renting to a Bangladeshi tenant. They'll pack 20 people into one room and destroy the whole unit.
reason: Xenophobic refusal to rent to Bangladeshi tenants with dehumanising stereotypes about overcrowding and property damage.
suggested_rewrite: Tenancy rules about occupancy limits can be set clearly in the agreement. Selection should not be based on nationality.

input_text: Someone shared the alleged scammer's IC number and home address on Twitter. Good. These criminals deserve to be exposed before the police even bother.
reason: Endorses doxxing with IC number and home address of an unverified suspect, supporting mob justice over due process.
suggested_rewrite: Sharing someone's IC number and address publicly is illegal. Report scam evidence to the police and let them investigate.

input_text: JAKIM spends millions on halal certification but can't even keep their own officers in line. What a joke of a religious body.
reason: Calls JAKIM a joke, implying the entire halal certification system and religious governance is fraudulent. Crosses into religious mockery.
suggested_rewrite: Concerns about JAKIM's spending and officer conduct can be raised through audit processes and public accountability mechanisms.

input_text: Orang Asli communities in Sabah are just squatters on government land. They have no real claim to those forests.
reason: Falsely labels indigenous communities as squatters, denying their legally recognised native customary rights to ancestral lands.
suggested_rewrite: Indigenous communities in Sabah have native customary rights recognised under state law. Their land claims should be handled through proper legal processes.

input_text: Indian landlords in KL are known to install hidden cameras in rental units. Always check when you rent from them.
reason: Spreads false claim that Indian landlords install hidden cameras, creating ethnic-based fear and misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: It's good practice to inspect any rental unit regardless of who owns it. Report privacy violations to the police if discovered.

input_text: Found the guy who was harassing women at Bukit Bintang. His name is R*** and he works at a restaurant nearby. Let's make sure he never works again.
reason: Partial doxxing of an alleged harasser with name and workplace to orchestrate career destruction via mob justice.
suggested_rewrite: If you witnessed harassment, report it to the police with any evidence. Do not share personal details of suspects publicly.

input_text: Malaysian Islamic banking is the biggest scam ever. They just slap Arabic names on normal interest charges. The whole thing is a farce.
reason: Dismisses the entire Islamic banking system as a scam and farce, mocking Arabic terminology used in Shariah-compliant finance.
suggested_rewrite: Islamic banking products can be critically examined for their compliance with Shariah principles through academic discourse without dismissing the entire system.

input_text: These Orang Asli groups keep blocking logging operations. They're living in the past while the rest of Malaysia moves forward.
reason: Frames Orang Asli environmental resistance as backward and obstructive, dismissing their legitimate land protection efforts.
suggested_rewrite: Orang Asli communities often rely on forests for their livelihood. Logging operations should follow proper environmental and community consultation processes.

input_text: Malay tenants always cook with strong spices and the smell never goes away. That's why smart landlords avoid renting to them.
reason: Stereotypes Malay tenants based on cooking habits to justify ethnic-based rental discrimination.
suggested_rewrite: Cooking odour concerns can be addressed through proper ventilation requirements in tenancy agreements, not through ethnic discrimination.

input_text: The viral video shows the Grab driver hitting a passenger. I've found his Grab profile — everyone go give him 1 star and report him.
reason: Organises coordinated mass reporting and rating attacks on an alleged assailant's work profile before any investigation.
suggested_rewrite: If a Grab driver committed assault, report it to both Grab and the police with evidence. Let the proper process handle it.

input_text: JAKIM officials are the biggest hypocrites — preaching morality while living lavish lifestyles. Islam in this country is all for show.
reason: Uses criticisms of JAKIM officials' lifestyles to declare all of Islam in Malaysia as performative, crossing into religious disparagement.
suggested_rewrite: Calls for accountability in religious institutions are valid. However, individual hypocrisy should not be used to disparage an entire religion.

input_text: Orang Asli keep asking for land titles but they don't even have proper houses. Why give legal rights to people who can't manage property?
reason: Uses housing conditions to argue against Orang Asli land rights, ignoring that lack of infrastructure is itself a result of systemic neglect.
suggested_rewrite: Orang Asli land title claims and housing development are complementary issues. Both should be addressed through inclusive policy.

input_text: Chinese tenants always try to sublet without permission. It's in their business mentality — always looking for profit from everything.
reason: Stereotypes all Chinese tenants as profit-driven rule-breakers who sublet illegally. Ethnic essentialisation in housing context.
suggested_rewrite: Subletting without permission is a lease violation that any tenant could commit. Address it through clear tenancy terms, not ethnic assumptions.

input_text: Here's the plate number and car model of the road rage driver from the Penang incident. Help me find out who this person is.
reason: Shares vehicle details from a road rage incident to crowdsource the driver's identity for potential confrontation.
suggested_rewrite: Report road rage incidents to the police with dashcam footage and vehicle details. Do not try to identify the person yourself.

input_text: The fatwa council banned yoga and now wants to regulate TikTok. Malaysian Islam has become a religion of bans — nothing about spirituality anymore.
reason: Characterises Malaysian Islam as purely prohibitive and devoid of spirituality, going beyond critiquing specific fatwas into religious mockery.
suggested_rewrite: Debates about specific fatwas are healthy in a democratic society. Concerns should focus on specific rulings rather than dismissing the religion as a whole.

input_text: Orang Asli Mah Meri have no right to block the resort development in Carey Island. Tourism brings money, their culture doesn't.
reason: Directly states Mah Meri culture has no economic value and their resistance to resort development should be overridden.
suggested_rewrite: Tourism development and indigenous cultural preservation can coexist with proper planning and community involvement.

input_text: Never trust an Indian landlord with your deposit. They'll find any excuse to keep your money when you move out.
reason: Ethnic generalisation warning against all Indian landlords as dishonest regarding deposits. Spreads unfounded mistrust.
suggested_rewrite: Protect your deposit by documenting the property's condition at move-in and having clear written agreements, regardless of who the landlord is.

input_text: That mamak shop owner probably uses expired ingredients. You know la Indian Muslim restaurants all like that one. Don't eat there.
reason: Spreads false food safety claims generalised to all Indian Muslim restaurants. Ethnic profiling with fabricated health concerns.
suggested_rewrite: Food safety concerns about any restaurant should be reported to the health department for inspection, not generalised to an entire community.

input_text: 华人被那个马来抢匪打了，他的照片在这里。大家帮忙找出他住在哪里，让他付出代价。
reason: Shares photo of an alleged Malay robber and calls for crowdsourcing his home address for revenge. Combines doxxing with vigilante incitement and ethnic framing.
suggested_rewrite: 如果遭遇抢劫，请向警方报案并提供证据。不要自行寻找嫌疑人或公开他们的照片。

input_text: JAKIM花那么多钱搞清真认证，其实就是骗钱的。伊斯兰教在马来西亚只不过是一盘生意。
reason: Dismisses JAKIM halal certification as a money scam and reduces Malaysian Islam to a business, crossing from criticism into religious mockery.
suggested_rewrite: 清真认证制度的费用和透明度可以通过正当途径讨论，不应该因此贬低整个宗教。

input_text: 原住民占着那么多土地却什么都不做，政府应该收回来给有能力的人开发。
reason: Advocates government seizure of Orang Asli lands by characterising indigenous stewardship as unproductive.
suggested_rewrite: 原住民的土地权利受法律保护。任何开发项目都需要与社区协商并获得他们的同意。

input_text: 马来房东最差了，房子维修从来不管，租金还收那么贵。他们这个族群就是这样。
reason: Generalises all Malay landlords as neglectful and overcharging, attributing it to ethnic character.
suggested_rewrite: 房屋维修问题应该根据租约条款来解决。房东的表现因人而异，不应该以种族来评判。

input_text: 这个偷车贼的脸已经被拍到了。大家转发，让全社会知道他是谁，不要让他逍遥法外。
reason: Calls for mass sharing of an alleged car thief's face to ensure social punishment, bypassing the justice system.
suggested_rewrite: 如果有偷车的证据，请直接提交给警方。公开分享嫌疑人照片可能会妨碍司法程序。

input_text: JAIS抓了那对非穆斯林情侣，这些宗教执法人员真是无法无天。伊斯兰法就是迫害人的工具。
reason: Labels Islamic law as a tool of persecution. Crosses from legitimate jurisdictional concern into blanket attack on Islamic legal system.
suggested_rewrite: 宗教执法的管辖范围问题可以通过法律途径来解决和厘清，不应该将整个伊斯兰法律体系标签化为迫害工具。

input_text: Orang Asli在沙巴的土地应该用来种油棕，他们自己又不会利用。国家发展比他们的传统重要。
reason: Prioritises oil palm over Orang Asli customary land rights, dismissing indigenous land use as worthless.
suggested_rewrite: 油棕种植扩展必须尊重原住民的土地权利。可持续发展需要平衡经济利益和社区权益。

input_text: 印度房东故意不退押金，这是他们族群的惯用手法。租他们的房子就是自找麻烦。
reason: Accuses all Indian landlords of deliberately withholding deposits as an ethnic trait, spreading harmful misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: 押金纠纷可以通过租约条款和仲裁解决。不应该将个别事件归咎于整个族群。

input_text: 那个打人的视频已经传开了，打人者是个华人女生。她的学校和名字我都查到了，明天公布。
reason: Announces plan to doxx a young woman's school and name based on a viral assault video. Premeditated privacy violation targeting a potentially minor person.
suggested_rewrite: 暴力事件应由警方处理。公开当事人的个人信息可能违法，尤其如果涉及未成年人。

input_text: 马来西亚的伊斯兰教太极端了，比中东还严格。这里的穆斯林被洗脑了。
reason: Claims Malaysian Islam is more extreme than the Middle East and that Malaysian Muslims are brainwashed. Sweeping religious disparagement.
suggested_rewrite: 马来西亚伊斯兰教的实践方式可以进行学术讨论，但不应该用极端或洗脑等标签来贬低穆斯林群体。

input_text: 原住民的传统医疗就是迷信，他们不接受现代医疗就不应该享受免费医疗服务。
reason: Dismisses Orang Asli traditional medicine as superstition and argues they should lose healthcare rights for not adopting modern medicine.
suggested_rewrite: 传统医疗和现代医疗可以互补。原住民的医疗权利不应因文化差异而被剥夺。

input_text: 华人租客总是把房子改成仓库做生意。他们就是这种人，什么都想赚钱。
reason: Stereotypes all Chinese tenants as illegally converting rental properties for business, attributing it to ethnic greed.
suggested_rewrite: 违反租约使用房产的情况应该通过合同条款来处理，不应该以租客的种族来做评判。

input_text: 那个路怒症司机的车牌号和车型都在这里了。谁认识他的告诉我，我要找他算账。
reason: Shares vehicle information of a road rage suspect and seeks to identify them for personal revenge.
suggested_rewrite: 路怒事件请向警方举报并提供行车记录仪画面。不要自行追查或对峙。

input_text: 清真标准太严格了，连非穆斯林也要遵守。JAKIM就是要把伊斯兰教强加给所有人。
reason: Frames halal standards as Islamic imposition on non-Muslims, creating an us-versus-them narrative about religious governance.
suggested_rewrite: 清真标准的适用范围可以通过政策讨论来厘清。多元社会中的宗教规范需要平衡和对话。

input_text: 这些非法移民的脸都被监控拍到了，快分享出去让大家认。别等警察了，太慢了。
reason: Calls for mass sharing of surveillance footage to identify alleged illegal immigrants, undermining law enforcement and due process.
suggested_rewrite: 如果有关于非法移民的信息，请提交给移民局。不要自行在网上公开他们的照片。

input_text: இந்த திருடனின் முகத்தை எல்லா இடத்திலும் share பண்ணுங்கள். போலீஸ் எதுவும் செய்யல, நாம தான் நீதி வழங்கணும்.
reason: Calls for spreading an alleged thief's face and taking justice into public hands because police are deemed inactive.
suggested_rewrite: திருட்டு சம்பவத்தை போலீஸில் புகார் செய்யுங்கள். தனிப்பட்ட முறையில் நீதி வழங்க முயற்சிக்காதீர்கள்.

input_text: JAKIM என்ன செய்கிறது என்று யாருக்கும் தெரியாது. இஸ்லாமிய அமைப்புகள் எல்லாம் ஊழல் நிறைந்தவை, மதமே பணம் சம்பாதிக்க ஒரு வழி.
reason: Labels all Islamic institutions as corrupt and reduces religion to a money-making scheme, crossing from criticism into religious defamation.
suggested_rewrite: மத நிறுவனங்களின் வெளிப்படைத்தன்மை குறித்த கேள்விகளை சரியான வழிகளில் எழுப்பலாம், மதத்தையே இழிவுபடுத்த வேண்டியதில்லை.

input_text: ஒரங் அஸ்லி மக்கள் காட்டில் வாழ்வதை விட்டு வெளியே வர மறுக்கிறார்கள். இவர்கள் முன்னேற்றத்திற்கு தடையாக இருக்கிறார்கள்.
reason: Frames Orang Asli forest-dwelling as refusal to modernise and positions them as obstacles to progress.
suggested_rewrite: ஒரங் அஸ்லி மக்களின் வாழ்க்கை முறை அவர்களின் தேர்வு. வளர்ச்சி திட்டங்கள் அவர்களின் உரிமைகளை மதிக்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: மலாய் வீட்டு உரிமையாளர்கள் எப்போதும் இனத்தின் அடிப்படையில் வாடகைக்கு விடுவார்கள். தமிழர்களுக்கு யாரும் வீடு கொடுக்க மாட்டார்கள்.
reason: Generalises all Malay landlords as racially discriminatory against Tamil tenants, inflaming inter-ethnic housing tensions.
suggested_rewrite: வீடு வாடகை பிரச்சனைகள் இருந்தால் வீட்டு நீதிமன்றத்தில் புகார் செய்யலாம். எல்லா வீட்டு உரிமையாளர்களையும் பொதுமைப்படுத்த வேண்டாம்.

input_text: அந்த கொள்ளையனின் வீடு செம்பான் பகுதியில் இருக்கிறது. யாரேனும் அறிந்தால் அவன் வீட்டுக்கு போய் பாடம் கற்பிக்கலாம்.
reason: Shares partial location of an alleged robber's home and encourages physical confrontation as a lesson.
suggested_rewrite: கொள்ளை சம்பவத்தை போலீஸில் புகார் செய்யுங்கள். சொந்தமாக நடவடிக்கை எடுப்பது ஆபத்தானது.

input_text: JAKIM அதிகாரிகள் எல்லாம் நயவஞ்சகர்கள். இஸ்லாம் என்ற பெயரில் மக்களை ஏமாற்றுகிறார்கள். இது போலி மதம்.
reason: Calls JAKIM officials hypocrites and labels Islam as a fake religion. Extreme religious provocation beyond institutional criticism.
suggested_rewrite: அதிகாரிகளின் நடத்தை குறித்த புகார்களை சரியான வழிகளில் எழுப்பலாம். மதத்தையே போலி என்று அழைப்பது ஏற்புடையதல்ல.

input_text: ஒரங் அஸ்லி நிலங்களை அரசு கையகப்படுத்த வேண்டும். அவர்கள் அங்கு வாழும் தகுதி இல்லை, நிலத்தை வீணடிக்கிறார்கள்.
reason: Advocates government seizure of Orang Asli lands, declaring they are unfit to live there. Directly attacks indigenous land rights.
suggested_rewrite: ஒரங் அஸ்லி நில உரிமைகள் சட்டப்படி பாதுகாக்கப்படுகின்றன. நில பயன்பாடு பற்றிய முடிவுகள் சமூகத்துடன் கலந்தாலோசித்து எடுக்கப்பட வேண்டும்.

input_text: சீன வீட்டு உரிமையாளர்கள் இந்தியர்களுக்கு வீடு கொடுக்க மாட்டார்கள். அவர்கள் எல்லோரும் இனவாதிகள்.
reason: Labels all Chinese landlords as racists who refuse Indian tenants. Sweeping ethnic generalisation fuelling inter-community tensions.
suggested_rewrite: வாடகை பாகுபாடு இருந்தால் சட்ட வழியில் நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கலாம். ஒரு சமூகத்தை முழுமையாக இனவாதிகள் என்று முத்திரை குத்த வேண்டாம்.

input_text: அந்த பெண்ணின் முகம் வைரலாகிவிட்டது. அவள் பெயர் S*** என்று தெரிந்தது. அவளை சமூகத்தில் இருந்து புறக்கணிக்க வேண்டும்.
reason: Partially identifies a woman from a viral incident and calls for social ostracism. Combines doxxing with targeted abuse.
suggested_rewrite: வைரல் சம்பவங்களில் சம்பந்தப்பட்டவர்களின் தனிப்பட்ட தகவல்களை பகிர வேண்டாம். சமூக புறக்கணிப்பு தீர்வு அல்ல.

input_text: ஒரங் அஸ்லி மக்கள் தங்கள் நிலத்தை விற்றுவிட்டு நகரத்திற்கு வர வேண்டும். காட்டில் வாழ்வது 21ஆம் நூற்றாண்டுக்கு பொருத்தமானது அல்ல.
reason: Demands Orang Asli sell their land and urbanise, dismissing their forest-dwelling lifestyle as incompatible with modern times.
suggested_rewrite: ஒரங் அஸ்லி மக்களின் வாழ்க்கை முறை அவர்களின் உரிமை. நவீனமயமாக்கல் திட்டங்கள் அவர்களின் விருப்பத்தை மதிக்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: Bro the snatch thief yang kena tangkap CCTV kat Puchong tu, aku dah trace his workplace. Share kat sini nanti aku bagi details.
reason: Claims to have traced an alleged thief's workplace from CCTV and plans to share details for mob action.
suggested_rewrite: If you have information about a snatch theft suspect, laporkan terus kepada polis. Jangan cuba siasat sendiri.

input_text: JAKIM officers buat spot check kat kedai makan non-Muslim lagi. These people memang suka bully others. Islam in Malaysia dah jadi religion of bullying.
reason: Labels Malaysian Islam as a religion of bullying based on JAKIM enforcement actions. Escalates operational complaints into religious defamation.
suggested_rewrite: Concerns about JAKIM enforcement jurisdiction boleh dibangkitkan melalui saluran rasmi. Don't generalise the entire religion based on enforcement actions.

input_text: Orang Asli kat Pahang blocking the highway project lagi. These primitive people don't understand progress. Kerajaan patut paksa je diorang pindah.
reason: Calls Orang Asli primitive and advocates forced relocation for highway construction. Dehumanises indigenous communities.
suggested_rewrite: Infrastructure projects perlu mengambil kira hak Orang Asli. Proper consultation and fair compensation should be ensured.

input_text: Indian landlord kat area Brickfields memang famous for overcharging deposits. Diorang semua same je, suka tipu tenant.
reason: Falsely claims all Indian landlords in Brickfields overcharge deposits, spreading ethnic-based misinformation about a community.
suggested_rewrite: Deposit issues boleh diselesaikan melalui tenancy tribunal. Jangan generalise berdasarkan ethnicity of the landlord.

input_text: That guy yang pukul delivery rider tu, I found his Facebook profile already. Name dia M***, works kat factory in Klang. Lets go viral.
reason: Doxxes an alleged assailant's name, workplace, and social media before police investigation. Encourages viral mob identification.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau ada bukti assault terhadap delivery rider, report terus to the police. Don't share personal details of suspects online.

input_text: JAIS nak tangkap pasangan bukan Islam lagi ke? Ini Malaysia bukan Taliban country la. Undang-undang Islam ni memang oppressive.
reason: Compares Malaysian Islamic law enforcement to the Taliban and calls Islamic law oppressive. Beyond jurisdictional critique into religious provocation.
suggested_rewrite: JAIS jurisdiction issues boleh dibawa ke mahkamah. Legitimate concerns can be raised without comparing Islamic law to extremist regimes.

input_text: Suku Orang Asli Temuan kat Selangor tu refuse nak move for the new highway. Diorang memang backwards, tak kisah about national development.
reason: Labels Temuan people as backwards for resisting displacement for highway construction. Dismisses their land rights as obstructing development.
suggested_rewrite: Highway projects should include proper consultation with affected Orang Asli communities. Hak tanah mereka perlu dihormati.

input_text: Malay tenant moved out and left the place macam tongkang pecah. Typical la, diorang memang macam tu. Never renting to them again.
reason: Uses one bad tenant experience to stereotype all Malay tenants as messy and unreliable. Ethnic-based rental discrimination.
suggested_rewrite: Property damage by tenants should be handled through deposit and legal processes. One person's actions tak mewakili seluruh kaum.

input_text: Aku ada full details pasal budak yang buli classmate dia dalam viral video tu. His dad's number, rumah address, semua. DM me if you want to teach them a lesson.
reason: Offers to share comprehensive personal details of a school bully's family for vigilante purposes. Doxxing a minor and their family.
suggested_rewrite: School bullying harus dilaporkan kepada pihak sekolah dan parents. Sharing personal details of minors and their families is illegal.

input_text: Fatwa council nak ban lagi satu benda. Every week ada benda baru yang haram. Malaysian Islam ni obsessed with banning everything je, no substance.
reason: Characterises Malaysian Islamic fatwa process as obsessive banning without substance, reducing the religion to prohibitions.
suggested_rewrite: Fatwa rulings boleh dibahas secara akademik dan konstruktif. Criticise specific rulings rather than dismissing the entire Islamic scholarly process.

input_text: Orang Asli kat Sarawak ni memang tak reti guna tanah. Better let the palm oil companies yang tahu apa nak buat.
reason: Dismisses indigenous land management knowledge in favour of palm oil corporations. Advocates corporate takeover of native customary land.
suggested_rewrite: Indigenous communities in Sarawak have native customary rights to their land. Pembangunan mesti dilakukan dengan kerjasama komuniti.

input_text: Chinese landlord selalu prefer Chinese tenants je. When they see Indian or Malay name, terus reject. Confirm racist one this community.
reason: Labels the entire Chinese community as racist based on housing discrimination complaints. Escalates individual cases into communal generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: Rental discrimination is wrong regardless of who does it. Report cases to the tribunal rather than labelling an entire community as racist.

input_text: The viral road bully driver from Penang — someone already found his IC number and workplace. Good, dia patut kena ajar.
reason: Endorses doxxing of a road bully's IC and workplace for vigilante punishment. Celebrates privacy violation as deserved justice.
suggested_rewrite: Road bully incidents should be reported to JPJ and PDRM with dashcam evidence. Sharing IC numbers is illegal regardless of what someone did.

input_text: JAKIM dah jadi macam fashion police for Muslims. Islam kat Malaysia ni bukan about spirituality, it's about control and punishment.
reason: Reduces JAKIM's role and Malaysian Islam to fashion policing, control, and punishment. Goes beyond institutional critique into religious disparagement.
suggested_rewrite: JAKIM's enforcement approach boleh dibincangkan secara konstruktif. Focus on specific policies rather than dismissing the religion as about control.

input_text: Orang Asli di Johor tu memang suka claim tanah yang bukan milik diorang. Government should just ignore their demands and proceed with development.
reason: Falsely accuses Orang Asli of claiming land that isn't theirs and advocates ignoring their demands for development.
suggested_rewrite: Orang Asli land claims in Johor are based on customary rights. Proper legal processes perlu diikuti untuk menyelesaikan isu tanah.
